summary_en: ＲＹＯＤＥＮ announced a material dividend change (dividend hike). Reframes the return-of-capital baseline.
summary_jp: ＲＹＯＤＥＮが配当方針変更を開示（増配）。資本還元基準が刷新。

summary_en: ＲＹＯＤＥＮ announced a material dividend change (progressive policy). Reframes the return-of-capital baseline.
summary_jp: ＲＹＯＤＥＮが配当方針変更を開示（累進配当方針）。資本還元基準が刷新。
